Title: RowGrid Layout Example
Summary: This template exercises the rowgrid element by splitting content into equal-width columns while allowing each column to stack multiple text elements, spacers, and nested row content.
Col1Body: Equal-width columns work well for card-style summaries where the amount of supporting narrative varies per column.
Col2Body: The second column includes a spacer between the metric and the paragraph to show that regular flow elements stack naturally inside a rowgrid column.
Col3Body: Columns can also contain nested row elements for compact label and value pairs.
LeftDetail: The left detail area can hold a longer paragraph and should wrap within half of the available content width rather than using the full page width.
RightDetail: The right detail area is a separate flow context with the same width as the left one, so both columns stay aligned even when their content heights differ.
